auth.create.securityId: You'll also receive a public ID (unique identifier on the network). Use it to sign in.

auth.create.acceptRules: I have read and accept the library rules
auth.create.consentEmail: I agree to receive communications by email (loan notices, library news).

auth.create.acceptRulesRequired: You must accept the library rules.
